data.Project: DESPINA: X-Ray spectrometer optimized for deep space PNT using pulsar and other astrophysical X-ray sources
ODIN: OPNAV instrument for deep space navigation
High-TRL optical frequency combs (OFC) that enable planar on-chip navigation-grade oscillators with significantly better noise performance
On-Orbit Demonstration of Surface Feature-Based Navigation and Timing
Autonomous Nanosatellite Swarming (ANS) using Radio Frequency and Optical Navigation

data.Current Status: Leveraged technology for ANS in Starling mission

data.Project: Mems Reaction Control and Maneuvering for Picosat beyond LEO
data.Current Status: Awarded a suborbital flight test through NASA’s Flight Opportunities program

data.Project: A Small Satellite Lunar Communications and Navigation System
A high-precision continuous-time PNT compact module for the LunaNet small spacecraft
